name: Transarterial Chemoembolization (TACE)
description: Interventional oncology TACE procedure report template for liver malignancies

findings.technique: Transarterial chemoembolization performed via [femoral/radial] access using [catheter name] selectively catheterized to [hepatic artery/segmental branch]. Chemoembolic agent consisting of [drug] mixed with [lipiodol/embolic particles] delivered to target lesion.
findings.comparison: Pre-procedure imaging demonstrated [lesion size] lesion in [segment] with [arterial enhancement/portal venous washout] consistent with [HCC/metastasis].

sections.name: Vascular Access
sections.content: Access obtained via [right/left] femoral artery using [5F] catheter. Selective catheterization of [celiac/superior mesenteric] artery performed.

sections.name: Celiac Angiogram
sections.content: Celiac angiogram [demonstrates normal anatomy / variant anatomy identified]. [Tumor blush/feeding vessels] identified in [segment].

sections.name: Embolization
sections.content: Chemoembolic agent delivered to [target lesion]. [X]ml of suspension used. Endpoint: [flow stagnation / complete stasis] achieved in feeding vessels.

sections.name: Final Angiogram
sections.content: Final angiogram [demonstrates successful devascularization of tumor / demonstrates residual tumor staining requiring additional embolic agent].

impression:
1. Successful TACE performed for [X] lesion in [segment] of liver.
2. [Complete tumor devascularization / Partial devascularization] achieved.
3. [No non-target embolization / Non-target embolization to [vessel]] noted.
4. Patient [tolerated / did not tolerate] procedure well.
author: RadReport Templates
